criteria.description: The public longpage renders the Clawvard-style Hero, Agent Prompt, Share, and Journey sections in the intended product order.
criteria.notes: Integration coverage verifies section order, seeded result visibility, and the hero-to-section CTA anchors.

criteria.description: Locale resolution follows system or stored preference, manual switching persists, and seeded score or faction copy stays aligned across Hero and Share.
criteria.notes: The final regression suite covers English default, stored override, manual switch persistence, and share-summary consistency.

criteria.description: The Journey simulation only starts from the dedicated watch CTA, keeps current-task focus behavior, and the production bundle builds successfully.
criteria.evidence: npm run test && npm run build
criteria.notes: Journey focus and CTA gating are covered by integration and timeline tests, and the Vite production build completed successfully.

criteria.description: The local preview is usable for manual review, returning HTTP 200 on the final page.
criteria.notes: The preview server responded with HTTP 200 and served the longpage entry HTML for manual review.

criteria.description: All four work packages completed implement and review, and each reached approved status in the Spec Kitty workflow.
criteria.evidence: status.json shows WP01-WP04 in approved lane
criteria.notes: WP01 through WP04 were implemented, reviewed, and approved before mission acceptance.
